project_classification.description: BMAD/Lens meta-framework toolkit — lifecycle orchestration assets, skills, prompts, scripts, and embedded documentation for AI agent workflows

completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith toolkit module (library type). Module version 4.0.0. Root contains _bmad/lens-work/ module core and docs/. No .github/ adapter layer present in this clone.
Discovered comprehensive existing docs in docs/ from April 15 full rescan. Used as baseline for deep scan refresh.
Tech stack confirmed: YAML (contracts/config), Markdown (prompts/skills/docs), Python (scripts/tests), Node.js (installer), GitHub Actions (CI). Version 4.0.0.
Deep scan: 41 skills, 57 prompts, 19 scripts, 10 tests + README, 8 contracts, 11 templates, 24 embedded docs. No API, data models, or UI components.
Source tree documented with annotated directory structure.
Dev and deployment guidance written. Script-driven workflow, no long-running server.
Architecture doc generated for monolith module with source-authoritative pattern.
Supporting docs generated: project-overview, source-tree-analysis, component-inventory, development-guide, deployment-guide, contribution-guide.

findings.project_classification: Monolith library/toolkit — Lens Workbench core module v4.0.0
findings.technology_stack: YAML, Markdown, Python, Node.js, GitHub Actions, Git
